LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.description: A splash of acid that continues to cause burn wounds for quite some time after the initial attack.
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.label: acid burn
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.stages.0.label: minor, receiving burns
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.stages.1.label: moderate, receiving burns
LanguageData.VEF_AcidBuildup.stages.2.label: serious, receiving burns

LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.description: This creature feeds on sunlight. Inadequate levels of light will kill it.
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.label: level of sunlight
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.0.label: adequate light
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.1.label: poor light levels

LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.3.label: lack of sunlight
LanguageData.VEF_LightSustenance.stages.4.label: extreme lack of sustenance
LanguageData.VFES_FreshAir.description: The air feels fresh and smells nice!
LanguageData.VFES_FreshAir.label: clean air
LanguageData.Bed_RefreshingSleep.description: Exquisite bed rest due to advanced bed sleeping systems
LanguageData.Bed_RefreshingSleep.label: refreshing sleep
LanguageData.Bed_RefreshingSleep.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.Bed_RefreshingSleep.stages.1.label: major
LanguageData.Bed_RefreshingSleep.stages.2.label: max

LanguageData.Wanted.description: This one is considered a criminal by a faction.
LanguageData.Wanted.label: wanted
LanguageData.Wanted.stages.0.label: wanted
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedHotSauce.description: Consumed a potent, spicy sauce made from blending and simmering chilis and other spices. While particularly strong hot sauces hurt at first, they are known to numb pain and work up a warm sweat shortly after consumption. Boosts pain resistance by 15% and cold temperature resistance by 10ºC for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedHotSauce.label: consumed hot sauce (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_AteGourmetMeal.description: This colonist consumed an incredible food.
LanguageData.VCE_AteGourmetMeal.label: consumed gourmet food (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedAgave.description: Agave nectar is a thin and semi-sweet nectar, known for its healing and anti-inflammatory properties. Gives a 15% immunity gain speed boost for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedAgave.label: consumed agave nectar (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedDigestibleResurrectorNanites: Resurrector nanites will resurrect this person as long as they are active. The effect lasts for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedMayo.description: Mayo is a thick emulsion of egg, oil, and other herbs. Mayonnaise, while terrible for you, adds a pleasing tang and is very calorically dense. It lowers hunger rate by 15% for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedMayo.label: consumed mayo (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedSpices.description: Consumed a variety of aromatic and pungent spices. It increases manipulation stat by 5% for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedSpices.label: consumed spices (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_SugarRush.description: Sugar is easily converted into energy by the body, which may result in a nice burst of energy. It increases moving stat by 15% for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_SugarRush.label: consumed sugar (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_WellFed.description: I have eaten a delicious and filling grilled meat. It lowers hunger rate by 35% for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_WellFed.label: well fed (from grilled meal)
LanguageData.VCE_WellFedFine.description: I have eaten a delicious and filling grilled meat. It lowers hunger rate by 35% for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_WellFedFine.label: well fed (from grilled meal)
LanguageData.VCE_WellFedGourmet.description: I have eaten a delicious and filling grilled meat. It lowers hunger rate by 35% for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_WellFedGourmet.label: well fed (from grilled meal)
LanguageData.VCE_WellFedLavish.description: I have eaten a delicious and filling grilled meat. It lowers hunger rate by 35% for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_WellFedLavish.label: well fed (from grilled meal)
LanguageData.VCE_WellFedSimple.description: I have eaten a delicious and filling grilled meat. It lowers hunger rate by 35% for 12 hours.
LanguageData.VCE_WellFedSimple.label: well fed (from grilled meal)
LanguageData.VCE_AteFineSushi.description: I have eaten a delicious and filling sushi meal.
LanguageData.VCE_AteFineSushi.label: consumed fine sushi (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_AteGourmetSushi.description: I have eaten a delicious and filling sushi meal.
LanguageData.VCE_AteGourmetSushi.label: consumed gourmet sushi (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_AteLavishSushi.description: I have eaten a delicious and filling sushi meal.
LanguageData.VCE_AteLavishSushi.label: consumed lavish sushi (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_AteSimpleSushi.description: I have eaten a delicious and filling sushi meal.
LanguageData.VCE_AteSimpleSushi.label: consumed simple sushi (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedSoySauce.description: A fermented paste of soybeans, roasted grain, brine, and Aspergillus bacteria. Soy sauce can be added directly to food, and is used as a dip or salt flavor in cooking, as well as providing a rich umami taste. Soy sauce contains 10 times the antioxidants of red wine, and can help prevent cardiovascular diseases (increases blood pumping and filtration).
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedSoySauce.label: consumed soy sauce (from meal)
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedWasabi.description: A paste made from ground wasabi rhizomes and used as a pungent condiment for sushi and other foods. It is similar in taste to hot mustard rather than chili peppers in that it stimulates the nose more than the tongue. Wasabi clears your breathing and makes you feel warmer for a while.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedWasabi.label: consumed wasabi (from meal)
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyInspiration.description: Consumed ambrandy. High quality ambrandy will provide an artistic inspiration if the colonist is capable of getting it.
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyInspiration.label: ambrandy inspiration
LanguageData.VBE_GinHigh.description: Drank some gin. Increases social impact.
LanguageData.VBE_GinHigh.label: gin high
LanguageData.VBE_GinHigh.stages.0.label: warm
LanguageData.VBE_GinHigh.stages.1.label: tipsy
LanguageData.VBE_GinHigh.stages.2.label: drunk
LanguageData.VBE_GinHigh.stages.3.label: hammered
LanguageData.VBE_GinHigh.stages.4.label: blackout
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaHigh.description: Drank some tequila. Imbibers of tequila are known to excel at extended combat.
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaHigh.label: tequila high
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaHigh.stages.0.label: warm
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaHigh.stages.1.label: tipsy
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaHigh.stages.2.label: drunk
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaHigh.stages.3.label: hammered
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaHigh.stages.4.label: blackout
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaHigh.description: Drank some vodka. Provides a melee accuracy buff that scales with drunkeness.
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaHigh.label: vodka high
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaHigh.stages.0.label: warm
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaHigh.stages.1.label: tipsy
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaHigh.stages.2.label: drunk
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaHigh.stages.3.label: hammered
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaHigh.stages.4.label: blackout
LanguageData.VBE_DoubleWhiskeyHigh.description: Drank some double whiskey. Increases global work speed by 20% and trade pricing by 20%.
LanguageData.VBE_DoubleWhiskeyHigh.label: double whiskey high
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyHigh.description: Drank some whiskey. Increases global work speed by 15%.
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyHigh.label: whiskey high
LanguageData.VBE_CaffeineAddiction.description: A chemical addiction to caffeine. Long-term presence of caffeine has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug. \nWithout regular doses of caffeine, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.VBE_CaffeineAddiction.label: caffeine addiction
LanguageData.VBE_CaffeineAddiction.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.VBE_CaffeineTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to caffeine. The more severe this tolerance is, the more caffeine it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.VBE_CaffeineTolerance.label: caffeine tolerance
LanguageData.VBE_HotCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 15% amount and 15% reduction in rest fall rate. Hot coffee reduces hypothermia, cold reduces heatstroke.
LanguageData.VBE_HotCoffeeHigh.label: hot coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_IcedCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 15% amount and 15% reduction in rest fall rate. Hot coffee reduces hypothermia, cold reduces heatstroke.
LanguageData.VBE_IcedCoffeeHigh.label: iced coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkCrash.description: An unpleasant delayed after-effect of energy drink consumption.
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkCrash.label: energy drink crash
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkHigh.description: Energy drinks restore rest immediately, and increase moving speed, but at the cost of a later crash.
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkHigh.label: energy drink high
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAsIngredient.description: This colonist drank a cocktail that had ambrandy as one of its ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAsIngredient.label: drank ambrandy based cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedGoStock.description: Go-juice stock is a gelatinized cube of Go-Juice, able to be digested rather than injected. So diluted, the drug won't block so much pain, and combat advantages will be much more subtle.
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedGoStock.label: consumed go-juice stock (from meal)
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedLuciferiumPowder.description: Luciferium powder is a very finely blended powder made from luciferium. So diluted, the drug won't certainly heal any wounds, but it will reinvigorate its consumer considerably.
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedLuciferiumPowder.label: consumed luciferium powder (from meal)
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedWakeupPowder.description: Wake-up powder is a crushed and powdered form of wake-up, surprisingly sweet and sometimes used as a replacement for sugar in desserts or dissolved into a morning espresso. So diluted, the drug won't be as stimulating. Note that, while not addictive, wake-up powder still carries risk (albeit very small) of a heart attack.
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedWakeupPowder.label: consumed wake-up powder (from meal)
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.description: A burst of sugar enters the bloodstream, providing some short-lived energy. Provides a 5% manipulation buff for 5 hours.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.label: drank soda
LanguageData.VBE_DrankTea.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankTea.label: drank tea
LanguageData.VBE_GinAsIngredient.description: This colonist drank a cocktail that had gin as one of its ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_GinAsIngredient.label: drank gin based cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_RBMeadAsIngredient.description: This colonist drank a cocktail that had mead as one of its ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_RBMeadAsIngredient.label: drank mead based cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaAsIngredient.description: This colonist drank a cocktail that had tequila as one of its ingredients. Provides an animal tame chance bonus of 15%.
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaAsIngredient.label: drank tequila based cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaAsIngredient.description: This colonist drank a cocktail that had vodka as one of its ingredients. Increases dodge chance by 20%.
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaAsIngredient.label: drank vodka based cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyAsIngredient.description: This colonist drank a cocktail that had whiskey as one of its ingredients. Provides a shooting accuracy bonus.
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyAsIngredient.label: drank whiskey based cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_WineAsIngredient.description: This colonist drank a cocktail that had wine as one of its ingredients. You monster.
LanguageData.VBE_WineAsIngredient.label: drank wine based cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_CiderAsIngredient.description: This colonist drank a cocktail that had cider as one of its ingredients. Many praise cider for its supposed antioxidant properties. Slightly removes toxic buildup.
LanguageData.VBE_CiderAsIngredient.label: drank cider based cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_CiderHigh.description: Alcohol from cider in the bloodstream. It makes people happy, but reduces capacities. Cannot cause alcohol addiction. Cannot get past the “warm” drunken stage no matter how many are downed.
LanguageData.VBE_CiderHigh.label: cider high
LanguageData.VBE_CiderHigh.stages.0.label: warm
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedCocktail.description: Consumed a nice cocktail. Has a chance to provide a random inspiration.
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedCocktail.label: consumed cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_DeluxeTobaccoHigh.description: Nicotine in the bloodstream. Generates a soft feeling of fuzzy well-being.
LanguageData.VBE_DeluxeTobaccoHigh.label: high-quality tobacco high
LanguageData.VBE_TobaccoAddiction.description: A chemical addiction to tobacco. Long-term use of tobacco has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug. \nWithout regular doses of tobacco, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.VBE_TobaccoAddiction.label: tobacco dependence
LanguageData.VBE_TobaccoAddiction.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.VBE_TobaccoHigh.description: Nicotine in the bloodstream. Generates a soft feeling of fuzzy well-being.
LanguageData.VBE_TobaccoHigh.label: tobacco high
LanguageData.VBE_TobaccoTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to tobacco. The more severe this tolerance is, the more tobacco it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.VBE_TobaccoTolerance.label: tobacco tolerance

Increases immunity gain speed by 20% and provides 15% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankBlackTea.label: drank black tea
LanguageData.VBE_DalgonaCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 15% amount and 15% reduction in rest fall rate. Cold coffee reduces heatstroke. Dalgona coffee provides a 10% research speed bonus.
LanguageData.VBE_DalgonaCoffeeHigh.label: dalgona coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_DrankEarlGreyTea.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Earl grey tea provides a 10% research speed bonus.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankEarlGreyTea.label: drank earl grey tea
LanguageData.VBE_LemonCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 15% amount and 15% reduction in rest fall rate. Hot coffee reduces hypothermia. Lemon coffee acts as a remedy against Gut Worms, increasing tending quality with each coffee drank.
LanguageData.VBE_LemonCoffeeHigh.label: lemon coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_IrishCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 16% amount and 16% reduction in rest fall rate. Increases global work speed by 16%. Hot coffee reduces hypothermia.
LanguageData.VBE_IrishCoffeeHigh.label: irish coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_DrankKombuchaTea.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Kombucha tea reduces the effects of Diabetes if present. Kombucha acts as a home remedy against the flu, reducing its severity by 5%.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankKombuchaTea.label: drank kombucha tea
LanguageData.VBE_LatteCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 18% amount and 18% reduction in rest fall rate. Latte coffee reduces hypothermia.
LanguageData.VBE_LatteCoffeeHigh.label: latte coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_DrankLemonTea.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Lemon tea acts as a remedy against Gut Worms, increasing tending quality with each coffee drank.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankLemonTea.label: drank lemon tea
LanguageData.VBE_DrankMasalaChai.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Masala chai acts as a home remedy against wound infections, reducing the severity of a random infection by 5%.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankMasalaChai.label: drank masala chai
LanguageData.VBE_MintCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 15% amount and 15% reduction in rest fall rate. Hot coffee reduces hypothermia. Mint coffee provides fresh breath, increasing social impact by 10%.
LanguageData.VBE_MintCoffeeHigh.label: mint coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_DrankMintTea.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Mint tea provides fresh breath, increasing social impact by 10%.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankMintTea.label: drank mint tea
LanguageData.VBE_DrankNoonChai.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Used for treating muscle parasites.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankNoonChai.label: drank noon chai
LanguageData.VBE_YuenYeungHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 15% amount and 13% reduction in rest fall rate. The tea in it increases immunity gain speed by 15%. Cold coffee reduces heatstroke.
LanguageData.VBE_YuenYeungHigh.label: yuenyeung high
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedMintLeaves.description: Consumed some fresh mint leaves. The fresh breath increases social impact by 10%.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedMintLeaves.label: consumed mint (from meal)
LanguageData.VTE_HigherBleedingRate.description: Hemophilia is the inability for blood to clot properly, causing wounds to bleed much more profusely.
LanguageData.VTE_HigherBleedingRate.label: hemophilic
LanguageData.VTE_RestSlowFallFactor.description: Pronounced mental or physical unrest causes insomnia, insomnia means one can often feel sluggish or exhausted and find themselves hardly ever capable of sleep.
LanguageData.VTE_RestSlowFallFactor.label: insomnia
LanguageData.VTE_SlowerBleedingRate.description: Higher red blood-cell count means hyper-coagulation occurs, causing wounds to bleed much less profusely.
LanguageData.VTE_SlowerBleedingRate.label: hyper-coagulant
LanguageData.VTE_SlowWorkSpeed.description: Whether by sour mood or mental issues, rebelling means any forced work is met with snide comments and eyerolls, and taken less than seriously.
LanguageData.VTE_SlowWorkSpeed.label: rebelling
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedArmHediff.label: fleshcrafted arm
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedEarHediff.label: fleshcrafted ear
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedEyeHediff.label: fleshcrafted eye
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedFingerHediff.label: fleshcrafted finger
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedFootHediff.label: fleshcrafted foot
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedHandHediff.label: fleshcrafted hand
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedHeartHediff.label: fleshcrafted heart
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedJawHediff.label: fleshcrafted jaw
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedKidneyHediff.label: fleshcrafted kidney
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedLegHediff.label: fleshcrafted leg
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedLiverHediff.label: fleshcrafted liver
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedLungHediff.label: fleshcrafted lung
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedNoseHediff.label: fleshcrafted nose
