LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedStomachHediff.label: fleshcrafted stomach
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedToeHediff.label: fleshcrafted toe
LanguageData.VME_FleshcraftedTongueHediff.label: fleshcrafted tongue
LanguageData.VME_MedicalEmergencyHediff.description: Stops the Nurse’s Rest, Recreation and Hunger from dropping for 12 hours. During this time, Nurse can only do Doctoring jobs properly.
LanguageData.VME_MedicalEmergencyHediff.label: medical emergency
LanguageData.VME_WorkCommand.description: Instruct everyone around to work harder and be more diligent, boosting global work speed and the cost of depleting recreation. The effect remains attached to the caster for 24 hours.
LanguageData.VME_WorkCommand.label: work command
LanguageData.VME_WorkCommandBuff.description: This person's work speed is boosted thanks to being near someone who is using the work command ability.
LanguageData.VME_WorkCommandBuff.label: work command
LanguageData.VDE_NoPain.description: This animal has a reduced pain sensitivity, and it takes longer to be downed due to pain.
LanguageData.VDE_NoPain.label: no pain sensitivity
LanguageData.VDE_SeparationSickness.description: When an awakened dryad reaches 2 years of age, they start getting affected by separation sickness. This sickness is progressive and always lethal. It is caused by the dryad losing its connection to the Gauranlen tree, and not being able to restore it due to being unshackled.\n\nSeparation sickness can be slowed down by medicine, but eventually every Awakened dryad dies.
LanguageData.VDE_SeparationSickness.label: separation sickness
LanguageData.VDE_SeparationSickness.stages.0.label: weakened
LanguageData.VDE_SeparationSickness.stages.1.label: withering
LanguageData.VDE_SeparationSickness.stages.2.label: vanishing
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggAddiction.description: A chemical addiction to active mechanites. Long-term presence of active mechanites has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without them. \nWithout regular doses of active mechanites, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggAddiction.label: active mechanites addiction
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggAddiction.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggHigh.description: Active mechanites in the bloodstream. They lift the mood and increase attentiveness.
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggHigh.label: high on active mechanites
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to active mechanites. The more severe this tolerance is, the more active mechanites it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggTolerance.label: active mechanites tolerance
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustAddiction.description: A chemical addiction to featherdust. Long-term use of featherdust has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug. \nWithout regular doses of featherdust, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustAddiction.label: featherdust dependence
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustAddiction.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustHigh.description: Featherdust's active chemical in the bloodstream. Generates a soft feeling of fuzzy well-being.
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustHigh.label: stoned on featherdust
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to featherdust. The more severe this tolerance is, the more featherdust it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustTolerance.label: featherdust tolerance
LanguageData.GR_AdrenalineBurst.description: Adrenaline rush greatly increases the speed of the hybrid for a while, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
LanguageData.GR_AdrenalineBurst.label: adrenaline rush
LanguageData.GR_AdrenalineBurst.stages.1.label: exhausted
LanguageData.GR_BloodFrenzy.description: This creature has been victim of a frenzied attack.
LanguageData.GR_BloodFrenzy.label: victim of blood frenzy
LanguageData.GR_Burrowing.description: Burrows underground to be able to move while being almost impervious to attacks. This ability needs to be recharged to be used again.
LanguageData.GR_Burrowing.label: burrowing underground
LanguageData.GR_Burrowing.stages.1.label: recovering
LanguageData.GR_CatReflexes.description: Cat reflexes greatly increases the speed and melee dodge chance of the hybrid for a while, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
LanguageData.GR_CatReflexes.label: cat reflexes
LanguageData.GR_CatReflexes.stages.1.label: exhausted
LanguageData.GR_CausedHorror.description: Releases an insanity cloud that reduces sanity of anyone passing through it, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
LanguageData.GR_CausedHorror.label: recently invoked the insanity of that which man is not meant to know
LanguageData.GR_CausedHorror.stages.0.label: recovering
LanguageData.GR_CausedPoisonCloud.description: Releases a poison cloud that harms anyone passing through it, except reptilians, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
LanguageData.GR_CausedPoisonCloud.label: recently released poison cloud
LanguageData.GR_CausedPoisonCloud.stages.0.label: recovering
LanguageData.GR_DistortionHediff.description: This body part has been terribly warped by being exposed to a dangerous spatial distortion. Warping is very painful, and warped body parts are often lost.
LanguageData.GR_DistortionHediff.label: warping
LanguageData.GR_ExtractedBrain.description: The brain or neural center of this creature has been extracted and refined into genetic material.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractedBrain.label: brain extracted
LanguageData.GR_Frenzied.description: The smell of its enemies' blood has filled this hybrid with a frenzy.
LanguageData.GR_Frenzied.label: frenzied
LanguageData.GR_HairballDamage.description: Genetically altered hairballs are suffocating this creature. This negatively affects breathing and can even cause unconsciousness.
LanguageData.GR_HairballDamage.label: suffocating damage
LanguageData.GR_HairballDamage.stages.0.label: initial-hidden
LanguageData.GR_HairballDamage.stages.1.label: initial
LanguageData.GR_HairballDamage.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.GR_HairballDamage.stages.3.label: moderate
LanguageData.GR_HairballDamage.stages.4.label: serious
LanguageData.GR_HairballDamage.stages.5.label: extreme
LanguageData.GR_HairballDamage.stages.6.label: nauseating
LanguageData.GR_HighlyFlammable.description: This creature will die quickly if set on fire.
LanguageData.GR_HighlyFlammable.label: highly flammable
LanguageData.GR_InsectClouds.description: Releases insect clouds that damage anyone crossing through them, except insectoids, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
LanguageData.GR_InsectClouds.label: releasing insect clouds
LanguageData.GR_InsectClouds.stages.1.label: recovering
LanguageData.GR_Kamikaze.label: sudden detonation
LanguageData.GR_Kamikaze.stages.0.label: initial-hidden
LanguageData.GR_Kamikaze.stages.1.label: critical
LanguageData.GR_KeenSenses.description: Keen senses greatly increases sight and conciousness of the hybrid for a while, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
LanguageData.GR_KeenSenses.label: keen senses
LanguageData.GR_KeenSenses.stages.1.label: exhausted
LanguageData.GR_LowRest.description: This creature has very little need for sleep, and can stay awake for a long time.
LanguageData.GR_LowRest.label: needs very little sleep
LanguageData.GR_MeleeDodge.description: This hybrid is very agile and receives a considerable bonus to melee dodge.
LanguageData.GR_MeleeDodge.label: melee dodging
LanguageData.GR_NoPain.description: This hybrid has a reduced pain sensitivity, and it takes longer to be downed due to pain.
LanguageData.GR_NoPain.label: no pain sensitivity
LanguageData.GR_PackTactics.description: This hybrid is collaborating with other nearby muffalowolves to bring down prey.
LanguageData.GR_PackTactics.label: pack tactics
LanguageData.GR_PackTacticsBuff.description: This hybrid is collaborating with other nearby muffalowolves to bring down prey.
LanguageData.GR_PackTacticsBuff.label: pack tactics
LanguageData.GR_PermanentBurn.description: A permanent burn scar that cannot be treated.
LanguageData.GR_PermanentBurn.label: permanent burn
LanguageData.GR_RabidSlash.description: This creature has been victim of a rabid slash.
LanguageData.GR_RabidSlash.label: victim of rabid slash
LanguageData.GR_RecentlyHatched.description: This creature has recently hatched from an incubator.
LanguageData.GR_RecentlyHatched.label: recently hatched
LanguageData.GR_ResearchDrive.description: Offer investigative insights to nearby researches, allowing them to more easily reach a breakthrough.\n\n<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color> "My fellow scientist, have you considered rejecting humanity, and returning to monkey? Food for thought".
LanguageData.GR_ResearchDrive.label: research drive
LanguageData.GR_ResearchDriveBuff.description: Being offered investigative insights.\n\n<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color> "My fellow scientist, have you considered rejecting humanity, and returning to monkey? Food for thought".
LanguageData.GR_ResearchDriveBuff.label: research drive
LanguageData.GR_SadisticAdrenaline.description: The lizardman has slaughtered a colony prisoner in cold blood, triggering the release of a potent hormone complex that is making it faster and stronger. This will last for a few hours.
LanguageData.GR_SadisticAdrenaline.label: sadistic adrenaline
LanguageData.GR_Stamina.description: Increased stamina greatly increases the armor and pain resistance of the hybrid for a while, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
LanguageData.GR_Stamina.label: increased stamina
LanguageData.GR_Stamina.stages.1.label: exhausted
LanguageData.GR_Stampeding.description: The stampeding ability increases the hybrid's speed and releases clouds of dust that block ranged visibility. Once used, this ability needs to be recharged to be used again.
LanguageData.GR_Stampeding.label: stampeding
LanguageData.GR_Stampeding.stages.1.label: recovering
LanguageData.GR_ToxicDamage.description: Toxins in the bloodstream. This can come from various sources, including environmental toxins, venomous bites, or poisoned weapons. \nAt high doses, toxic buildup is lethal. Even at low doses, it can generate cancers. \nContrary to base game toxic buildup, creatures who die with toxic damage can be eaten.
LanguageData.GR_ToxicDamage.label: toxic damage
LanguageData.GR_ToxicDamage.stages.0.label: initial-hidden
LanguageData.GR_ToxicDamage.stages.1.label: initial
LanguageData.GR_ToxicDamage.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.GR_ToxicDamage.stages.3.label: moderate
LanguageData.GR_ToxicDamage.stages.4.label: serious
LanguageData.GR_ToxicDamage.stages.5.label: extreme
LanguageData.GR_VentedExhaust.description: Vents exhaust fumes on the 8 adjacent tiles, burning anyone unlucky enough to be in melee, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
LanguageData.GR_VentedExhaust.label: recently vented exhaust gasses
LanguageData.GR_VentedExhaust.stages.0.label: recovering
LanguageData.GR_VeryLowRest.description: This creature has very little need for sleep, and can stay awake for a long time.
LanguageData.GR_VeryLowRest.label: needs very little sleep
LanguageData.GR_HungerByQuality.description: This is a hidden hediff that modifies the hybrid's hunger depending on quality.
LanguageData.GR_HungerByQuality.label: quality
LanguageData.GR_AnimalAbasia.description: A condition that makes an animal unable to walk by interfering with the motor cortex. If not treated in time, Abasia inevitably interferes with functioning of organs - for example by halting the heart functions. A creature with Animal Abasia can be tended to which will slow down the disease, but cannot be cured.\n\nAny hybrid or paragon animal will get this disease 3 years after being hatched or born naturally, though this is affected by the hybrids's quality.
LanguageData.GR_AnimalAbasia.label: animal abasia
LanguageData.GR_AnimalAbasia.stages.0.label: paralyzed
LanguageData.GR_AnimalTuberculosis.description: A disease originating from a bacterial infection that attacks lungs. Animals with tuberculosis will keep spitting blood until blood loss causes them to die. Every time a coughing attack occurs, the lungs of that animal will get more and more damaged. A creature with Animal Tuberculosis can be tended to which will slow down the disease, but cannot be cured.\n\nAny hybrid or paragon animal will get this disease 3 years after being hatched or born naturally, though this is affected by the hybrids's quality.
LanguageData.GR_AnimalTuberculosis.label: animal tuberculosis
LanguageData.GR_AnimalTuberculosis.stages.0.label: initial
LanguageData.GR_AnimalTuberculosis.stages.1.label: damaged lungs
LanguageData.GR_AnimalTuberculosis.stages.2.label: very damaged lungs
LanguageData.GR_GreaterScaria.description: A disease which causes affected creatures to enter berserk rages. A creature with greater scaria can't be cured and kills its host about five days after infection. Their seething rage will allow them to survive without having to eat or rest until their inevitable death.
LanguageData.GR_GreaterScaria.label: greater scaria
LanguageData.GR_MuscleNecrosis.description: A viral infection causing an animal organism to turn on itself and reject normal functioning tissue, causing widespread necrosis across the entire animal body. A creature with Muscle Necrosis can be tended to which will slow down the disease, but cannot be cured.\n\nAny hybrid or paragon animal will get this disease 3 years after being hatched or born naturally, though this is affected by the hybrids's quality.
LanguageData.GR_MuscleNecrosis.label: muscle necrosis
LanguageData.GR_MuscleNecrosis.stages.0.label: initial
LanguageData.GR_MuscleNecrosis.stages.1.label: necrotic
LanguageData.GR_MuscleNecrosis.stages.2.label: horribly necrotic
LanguageData.GR_SargSyndrome.description: A rare bacterial infection of the animal brain, which causes the animal to only be able to consume human meat, while consuming anything else will simply not satiate the animal’s hunger and make it vomit constantly. This will spell a death sentence for herbivores, and a slow death for carnivores. A creature with Sarg Syndrome can't be tended to or cured.\n\nAny hybrid or paragon animal will get this disease 3 years after being hatched or born naturally, though this is affected by the hybrids's quality.
LanguageData.GR_SargSyndrome.label: sarg syndrome
LanguageData.GR_AnimalControlHediff.description: This creature was genetically modified with a controller booster.
LanguageData.GR_AnimalControlHediff.label: animal controller
LanguageData.GR_BearLeg.comps.0.tools.0.label: animal implant: bear leg
LanguageData.GR_BearLeg.description: A prosthetic animal leg strengthened with bear muscles, and ending in a powerful bear claw that adds a powerful melee attack.
LanguageData.GR_BearLeg.label: animal implant: bear leg
LanguageData.GR_BearLiver.description: An implant that uses bear genes to improve function of the liver. Specially useful for those alcoholic chickens.
LanguageData.GR_BearLiver.label: animal implant: bear liver
LanguageData.GR_BoomalopeHeart.description: An implant that uses chemfuel to pump blood through the animal's body. This implant is intended for creatures whose heart is failing catastrophically, since it is less efficient than a natural heart.
LanguageData.GR_BoomalopeHeart.label: animal implant: boomalope heart
LanguageData.GR_BoomalopeStomach.description: An implant that uses boomalope genes to improve function of the stomach.
LanguageData.GR_BoomalopeStomach.label: animal implant: boomalope stomach
LanguageData.GR_CanidEye.description: An eye implant that uses genetic splicing with canid genes to give an old (or damaged) eye decent vision. This implant is not meant to replace healthy eyes.
LanguageData.GR_CanidEye.label: animal implant: canid eye
LanguageData.GR_CatTail.description: A tail implant that uses genetic splicing with feline genes to substitute a broken or missing tail. This implant is not meant to replace a healthy tail.
LanguageData.GR_CatTail.label: animal implant: cat tail
LanguageData.GR_ChickenBrains.description: An implant that uses chicken brain tissue to patch damaged neurological pathways. This implant is intended for brain-dead creatures.
LanguageData.GR_ChickenBrains.label: animal implant: chicken brains
LanguageData.GR_ChickenKidney.description: An implant that uses chicken genes to improve function of the kidney. Birds have large kidneys. Yep, you learned that today.
LanguageData.GR_ChickenKidney.label: animal implant: chicken kidney
LanguageData.GR_ChitinousHeart.description: A bionic heart implant using a reinforced shell of insectoid chitin for protection. This is a heart designed to take a beating. Pun intended, but it's the last one, I promise.
LanguageData.GR_ChitinousHeart.label: animal implant: chitinous heart
LanguageData.GR_CrocodileSpine.description: A bionic implant adding a sturdy crocodile spine to the creature's skeletal system.
LanguageData.GR_CrocodileSpine.label: animal implant: crocodile spine
LanguageData.GR_InsectileEye.description: A bionic implant which gives the creature compound insectile eyes. Compared with simple eyes, compound eyes possess a very large view angle, and can detect fast movement.
LanguageData.GR_InsectileEye.label: animal implant: insectile eye
LanguageData.GR_InsectMandibles.comps.0.tools.0.label: animal implant: insect mandibles
LanguageData.GR_InsectMandibles.description: A bionic implant adding insect mandibles to the creature's face. Insect mandibles improve manipulation and eating, while also working as an offensive weapon
LanguageData.GR_InsectMandibles.label: animal implant: insect mandibles
LanguageData.GR_InsectoidPheromones.description: An implant that uses genetic splicing with insectoid genes to give the ability to detect pheromones, thus improving the olfactory system. Can't be installed on birds and (ironically) insects.
LanguageData.GR_InsectoidPheromones.label: animal implant: insectoid pheromones
LanguageData.GR_LizardLeg.comps.0.tools.0.label: animal implant: lizard leg
LanguageData.GR_LizardLeg.description: A bionic animal leg reinforced with tough lizard skin.
LanguageData.GR_LizardLeg.label: animal implant: lizard leg
LanguageData.GR_MechaHeart.description: A bionic heart strengthened by the action of active mechanites.
LanguageData.GR_MechaHeart.label: animal implant: reinforced bionic heart
LanguageData.GR_MechaReceptors.description: This elephant auditory receptor can scan a really wide band of frequencies.
LanguageData.GR_MechaReceptors.label: animal implant: elephant auditory receptor
LanguageData.GR_MechaSpine.description: A bionic implant adding a plasteel structure with active mechanites to the creature's skeletal system.
LanguageData.GR_MechaSpine.label: animal implant: reinforced bionic spine
LanguageData.GR_MechaTail.comps.0.tools.0.label: animal implant: reinforced tail
LanguageData.GR_MechaTail.description: An advanced animal tail, even more powerful than a natural one.
LanguageData.GR_MechaTail.label: animal implant: reinforced tail
LanguageData.GR_MiniatureThrumboHorn.description: A bionic implant adding a small thrumbo horn where the creature's nose used to be. This implant acts as a nose, allowing the creature to breathe and smell, and can be used by the creature in melee. Birds, insects, and creatures that already have a thrumbo horn don't have enough space on their skull to install this implant.
LanguageData.GR_MiniatureThrumboHorn.label: animal implant: miniature thrumbo horn
LanguageData.GR_MonitorLizardBrain.description: A bionic implant using monitor lizard brain tissue. This highly intelligent reptile has very quick reflexes.
LanguageData.GR_MonitorLizardBrain.label: animal implant: monitor lizard brain
LanguageData.GR_MothTympanalOrgan.description: A bionic implant adding a moth tympanal organ to the creature's ear. Moths can hear sounds of a higher frequency than any bat can produce.
LanguageData.GR_MothTympanalOrgan.label: animal implant: moth tympanal organ
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloLung.description: An implant that uses muffalo genes to increase breathing capacity.
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloLung.label: animal implant: muffalo lung
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloSpine.description: A spine implant that uses genetic splicing with muffalo genes to give an old (or damaged) spine decent functioning. This implant is not meant to replace healthy spines.
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloSpine.label: animal implant: muffalo spine
LanguageData.GR_RodentEar.description: An ear implant that uses genetic splicing with rodent genes to give an old (or damaged) ear decent hearing. This implant is not meant to replace healthy ears.
LanguageData.GR_RodentEar.label: animal implant: rodent ear
LanguageData.GR_RodentNose.description: An implant that uses genetic splicing with rodent genes to give an old (or damaged) nose decent smelling. This implant is not meant to replace healthy noses. Can't be installed on birds and insects.
LanguageData.GR_RodentNose.label: animal implant: rodent nose
LanguageData.GR_ScytherTail.comps.0.tools.0.label: animal implant: scyther tail
LanguageData.GR_ScytherTail.description: A scyther tail created by attaching a scyther blade to an animal's tail.
LanguageData.GR_ScytherTail.label: animal implant: scyther tail
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboBrain.description: A bionic brain implant using thrumbo neural tissue. Superb intelligence and reflexes.
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboBrain.label: animal implant: bionic thrumbo brain
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboEye.description: A bionic eye reinforced with specialized photoreceptors from a powerful thrumbo.
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboEye.label: animal implant: bionic thrumbo eye
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboJaws.comps.0.tools.0.label: animal implant: bionic thrumbo jaws
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboJaws.description: A bionic implant adding thrumbo jaws to the creature's mouth. These creatures devour trees, so you can imagine their jaws are up to the task.
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboJaws.label: animal implant: bionic thrumbo jaws
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboLeg.comps.0.tools.0.label: animal implant: elephant leg
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboLeg.description: A bionic animal leg reinforced with muscle tissue from a powerful elephant.
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboLeg.label: animal implant: elephant leg
LanguageData.GR_WolfJaws.description: An implant that uses genetic splicing with wolf genes to give an old (or damaged) jaw decent functioning. This implant is not meant to replace healthy jaws.
LanguageData.GR_WolfJaws.label: animal implant: wolf fangs
LanguageData.GR_BearClaws.comps.0.tools.0.label: bear claws
LanguageData.GR_BearClaws.description: An improvement over the bionic Power Claw, these claws have been vat-grown with a mixture of human and bear DNA, and replace the subject's hand with versatile, non-retractable claws.
LanguageData.GR_BearClaws.label: humanoid implant: bear claws
LanguageData.GR_BearMuscleTissue.description: Grafts of bear muscle tissue on the subject's torso increase overall strength and stamina. These grafts however tend to stimulate the production of an abundance of body hair.
LanguageData.GR_BearMuscleTissue.label: humanoid implant: bear muscle tissue
LanguageData.GR_BoomalopeNodules.description: These skin nodules can be integrated in a human's torso, causing a huge explosion if the subjects dies violently.
LanguageData.GR_BoomalopeNodules.label: humanoid implant: boomalope nodules
LanguageData.GR_BunnyEars.description: This huge leporid ear gives amazing enhanced hearing. Also, super kawaii!
LanguageData.GR_BunnyEars.label: humanoid implant: bunny ear
LanguageData.GR_CatEye.description: This hybrid humanoid / feline eye provides improved night vision, at the expense of a certain short-sightedness outside and during the day. Ideal for nyctophile colonists.
LanguageData.GR_CatEye.label: humanoid implant: cat eye
LanguageData.GR_ChemfuelHeart.description: A reinforced bionic heart that acts like a miniature 4-stroke internal combustion engine powered by chemfuel to pump blood through the body.
LanguageData.GR_ChemfuelHeart.label: humanoid implant: chemfuel heart
LanguageData.GR_ChemfuelStomach.description: A reinforced bionic stomach that uses a combination of gastric acid and chemfuel to efficiently digest food.
LanguageData.GR_ChemfuelStomach.label: humanoid implant: chemfuel stomach
LanguageData.GR_CompoundEye.description: This hybrid humanoid / insectoid eye provides improved vision in a wide range of different wavelengths, including those usually outside the human range, completely modifying the way the subject perceives his surroundings.
LanguageData.GR_CompoundEye.label: humanoid implant: compound insectoid eye
LanguageData.GR_DevouringJaws.description: A set of improved teeth designed to rapidly chew and ingest any kind of food. Leaves kind of a mess, though...
LanguageData.GR_DevouringJaws.label: humanoid implant: devouring jaws
LanguageData.GR_DiggingBearClaws.description: Grotesque but powerful hand blades that have been modified to be used in mining operations, increasing both speed and yield.
LanguageData.GR_DiggingBearClaws.label: humanoid implant: digging mole claws
LanguageData.GR_HibernationModule.description: A biochip that modifies the brain to reduce the need for sleep.
LanguageData.GR_HibernationModule.label: humanoid implant: hibernation module
LanguageData.GR_HumanThrumboHorn.description: A genetically modified thrumbo horn that can be implanted in a subject's forehead. Nasty.
LanguageData.GR_HumanThrumboHorn.label: humanoid implant: thrumbo horn
LanguageData.GR_IguanaScales.description: A synthetic skin substitute that is much thicker and a much better insulator than human skin. This provides a measure of defense but, more importantly, makes the subject more resistant to high temperatures.
LanguageData.GR_IguanaScales.label: humanoid implant: iguana scales
LanguageData.GR_InsectoidAntennae.description: These hybrid humanoid / insectoid feeling appendages can be implanted in a subject's head, completely modifying the way the subject "sees" and feels the surrounding world. The experience may be slightly overwhelming due to sensorial overload.
LanguageData.GR_InsectoidAntennae.label: humanoid implant: insectoid antennae
LanguageData.GR_KidneyToxicFilters.description: This is a bioelectronic kidney prosthesis that greatly improves the efficiency of the subject's kidney by using insectoid tissue, providing resistence to toxic substances.
LanguageData.GR_KidneyToxicFilters.label: humanoid implant: kidney toxic filters
LanguageData.GR_MoleratNerveDampener.description: A biochip that reduces pain sensitivity, allowing the subject to survive pain shock.
LanguageData.GR_MoleratNerveDampener.label: humanoid implant: mole-rat nerve dampener
LanguageData.GR_MousePheromones.description: A bionic vomeronasal organ that allows the subject pheromonal communication with other animals, increasing the chance of taming and training them successfully.
LanguageData.GR_MousePheromones.label: humanoid implant: mouse pheromones
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloMammaries.description: By implanting muffalo mammaries into a colonist... Wait, what??? Who came up with this idea????? Anyway... this implant allows your colonist to be milked... What the...
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloMammaries.label: humanoid implant: muffalo mammaries
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloMuscles.description: By weaving muffalo muscle strands with the subject's muscular system, strength, resilience and carrying capacity are greatly increased.
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloMuscles.label: humanoid implant: muffalo strengthened muscles
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloSkin.description: A synthetic skin substitute that is much thicker and a much better insulator than human skin. This provides a measure of defense but, more importantly, makes the subject more resistant to low temperatures.
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloSkin.label: humanoid implant: muffalo skin
LanguageData.GR_NeuronReinforcement.description: A biochip using animal stem cells to reinforce the natural abilities of human neurons, increasing learning and research speed.
LanguageData.GR_NeuronReinforcement.label: humanoid implant: neuron reinforcement
LanguageData.GR_Ovipositor.description: You know you have gone too far in your scientific experiments when you are implanting a human being with an ovipositor. This will enable the colonist to lay chicken eggs twice a day. It hurts as hell, though. Also, yuck.
LanguageData.GR_Ovipositor.label: humanoid implant: ovipositor
LanguageData.GR_PsychicDampeners.description: Artificial hearing aids that block psychic emanations, providing considerable resistance to mechanoids' psychic attacks.
LanguageData.GR_PsychicDampeners.label: humanoid implant: psychic dampeners
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboSkin.description: A synthetic skin substitute that is much thicker and a much better insulator than human skin. This provides a lot of defense and makes the subject more resistant to extremes of temperature.
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboSkin.label: humanoid implant: thrumbo skin
LanguageData.GR_VenomousFangs.comps.0.tools.0.label: venomous fangs
LanguageData.GR_VenomousFangs.description: This hybrid implant substitutes the subject's jaw with a set of venomous fangs. Useful in combat, but not very comfortable.
LanguageData.GR_VenomousFangs.label: humanoid implant: venomous fangs
LanguageData.GR_WolfMuscularFibers.description: The subject's legs can be modified by weaving hybrid human/wolf muscle fibers within the base tissue, giving her a significant strength and speed boost.
LanguageData.GR_WolfMuscularFibers.label: humanoid implant: wolf muscular fibers
LanguageData.RB_BlindingBuildup.description: Blinding venom in the bloodstream. This venom is not lethal, but it will last for a while before it stops affecting sight.
LanguageData.RB_BlindingBuildup.label: blinding venom
LanguageData.RB_BlindingBuildup.stages.0.label: initial-hidden
LanguageData.RB_BlindingBuildup.stages.1.label: initial
LanguageData.RB_BlindingBuildup.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.RB_BlindingBuildup.stages.3.label: moderate
LanguageData.RB_BlindingBuildup.stages.4.label: serious
LanguageData.RB_BlindingBuildup.stages.5.label: extreme
LanguageData.RB_BlindingBuildup.stages.6.label: nauseating
LanguageData.RB_ChemfuelBuildup.description: Chemfuel in the bloodstream. \nAt high doses, this is lethal. Even at low doses, it can generate cancers. \nContrary to base game toxic buildup, creatures who die with injected chemfuel can be eaten.
LanguageData.RB_ChemfuelBuildup.label: injected chemfuel
LanguageData.RB_ChemfuelBuildup.stages.0.label: initial
LanguageData.RB_ChemfuelBuildup.stages.1.label: initial
LanguageData.RB_ChemfuelBuildup.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.RB_ChemfuelBuildup.stages.3.label: moderate
LanguageData.RB_ChemfuelBuildup.stages.4.label: serious
LanguageData.RB_ChemfuelBuildup.stages.5.label: extreme
LanguageData.RB_ParalysisBuildup.description: A fast acting toxin is coursing through this creature's veins, paralyzing his muscles. It will wear off after a while.
LanguageData.RB_ParalysisBuildup.label: paralysis
LanguageData.RB_ParalysisBuildup.stages.0.label: initial
LanguageData.RB_ParalysisBuildup.stages.1.label: stunned
LanguageData.RB_ParalysisBuildup.stages.2.label: very stunned
LanguageData.RB_ParalysisBuildup.stages.3.label: paralysed
LanguageData.RB_Stamina.description: Genetic honey is strengthening this creature's stamina.
LanguageData.RB_Stamina.label: increased stamina (from honey)
LanguageData.RB_ToxicBuildup.description: Toxins in the bloodstream. This can come from various sources, including environmental toxins, venomous bites, or poisoned weapons. \nAt high doses, toxic buildup is lethal. Even at low doses, it can generate cancers. \nContrary to base game toxic buildup, creatures who die with this toxic damage can be eaten.
LanguageData.RB_ToxicBuildup.label: poisoned blood
LanguageData.RB_ToxicBuildup.stages.0.label: initial
LanguageData.RB_ToxicBuildup.stages.1.label: initial
LanguageData.RB_ToxicBuildup.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.RB_ToxicBuildup.stages.3.label: moderate
LanguageData.RB_ToxicBuildup.stages.4.label: serious
LanguageData.RB_ToxicBuildup.stages.5.label: extreme
LanguageData.GR_PoisonAmpouleDrank.description: Poison in the bloodstream. Causes paralysis while slowing bleeding rate and wears off after 6 hours.
LanguageData.GR_PoisonAmpouleDrank.label: poison ampoule
LanguageData.VPE_Lucky.description: Psychically-induced luck that allows this person to always hit their target, and never be hit by their enemy.
LanguageData.VPE_Lucky.label: lucky
LanguageData.VPE_MindControlled.description: Psychically-induced mind control, giving absolute control to another person.
LanguageData.VPE_MindControlled.label: mind control
LanguageData.VPE_MindScramble.description: Psychically-induced mind scramble, caused by attempting to be two people at once.
LanguageData.VPE_MindScramble.label: mind scramble
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicGuidance.label: psychic guidance
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicGuide.description: Psychically-induced absence of mind caused by giving guidance to another person.
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicGuide.label: psychic guide
LanguageData.VPE_UnLucky.description: Psychically-induced bad luck that stops this person from ever hitting their target, whilst always being hit by the enemy.
LanguageData.VPE_UnLucky.label: unlucky
LanguageData.VPE_AgeSickness.description: Age-related psychic sickness greatly reducing manipulation and consciousness.
LanguageData.VPE_AgeSickness.label: age sickness
LanguageData.VPE_AnimalOvershield.description: An overshield that protects the animal from any ranged attacks.
LanguageData.VPE_AnimalOvershield.label: animal shield
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.description: Waves of serenity emanate deep from within, bringing peace of mind and lowering consciousness.
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.label: bliss
LanguageData.VPE_Blizzard.description: A huge wind with extreme snow that lowers sight, manipulation and movement speed.
LanguageData.VPE_Blizzard.label: blizzard
LanguageData.VPE_BlizzardSource.label: casting blizzard
LanguageData.VPE_BodiesConsumed.description: The amount of bodies that were consumed using the Consume Bodies psycast. Each body consumed increases a maximum neural heat by 1.
LanguageData.VPE_BodiesConsumed.label: bodies consumed
LanguageData.VPE_CorpseTalk.description: Psychically-induced link with a spirit of a deceased individual.
LanguageData.VPE_CorpseTalk.label: corpse talk
LanguageData.VPE_Darkvision.description: Psychically-induced ability to see through the darkness and shadows.
LanguageData.VPE_Darkvision.label: darkvision
LanguageData.VPE_Darkvision_Display.label: darkvision
LanguageData.VPE_DeathShield.description: Psychically-induced immortality that lasts for one day.
LanguageData.VPE_DeathShield.label: death shield
LanguageData.VPE_Essence.description: Psychically-split fragment of someone's personality imbued in this very being.
LanguageData.VPE_Essence.label: essence of
LanguageData.VPE_FrostRay.description: A heavily damaging and freezing ray of frost.
LanguageData.VPE_FrostRay.label: frost ray
LanguageData.VPE_GainedVitality.description: Psychically-induced vitality stolen from another person.
LanguageData.VPE_GainedVitality.label: psychic vitality
LanguageData.VPE_Ghostwalk.label: ghostwalk
LanguageData.VPE_GroupLink.description: Psychically-induced link between several entities. Any 'word of' psycast will resonate between all linked individuals.
LanguageData.VPE_GroupLink.label: group link
LanguageData.VPE_Hallucination.description: Strong psychic suggestion that reshapes reality in the eyes of the affected individuals, making them perceive their every day life as that of a luxury.
LanguageData.VPE_Hallucination.label: hallucination
LanguageData.VPE_Haywire.description: Psychically hacked programming that disrupts the IFF operations.
LanguageData.VPE_Haywire.label: haywire
LanguageData.VPE_Hurricane.description: A hurricane is causing difficulty moving and seeing.
LanguageData.VPE_Hurricane.label: hurricane
LanguageData.VPE_IceBlock.description: This entity is completely frozen in a block of ice, and will not be able to move until it melts.
LanguageData.VPE_IceBlock.label: frozen solid
LanguageData.VPE_IceShield.description: A psychic shield that protects from hypothermia and freezer enemies that interact with it.
LanguageData.VPE_IceShield.label: ice shield
LanguageData.VPE_InfinitePower.description: Generating infinite electricity supply to a given structure.
LanguageData.VPE_InfinitePower.label: powering
LanguageData.VPE_Liferot.description: Psychically-induced mass necrosis, causing living and healthy limbs and organs to rot on the victim.
LanguageData.VPE_Liferot.label: liferot
LanguageData.VPE_LostVitality.description: Psychically-induced weakness caused by vitality being stolen by another person.
LanguageData.VPE_LostVitality.label: psychic weakness
LanguageData.VPE_Obscured.label: obscured
LanguageData.VPE_Productivity.label: psychic productivity
LanguageData.VPE_Protection.description: Psychically-induced physical protection from incoming damage.
LanguageData.VPE_Protection.label: psychic protection
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicDrone.description: A strong psychic force affecting every enemy humanlike in the area, making them feel more disturbed, terrified, and paranoid.
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicDrone.label: psychic drone
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicPain.label: psychic pain
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicSoothe.description: Psychically-induced, self-satisfying perceptual distortions, giving a temporary mood boost.
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicSoothe.label: psychic soothe
LanguageData.VPE_Recharge.description: Electricity is being channeled to a nearby battery.
LanguageData.VPE_Recharge.label: recharge
LanguageData.VPE_Rot.label: rot
LanguageData.VPE_Shadowfocus.description: Psychically-induced increase to psychic sensitivity based on the lack of light around the psycaster.
LanguageData.VPE_Shadowfocus.label: shadowfocus
LanguageData.VPE_Smartbuzz.description: Psychically-induced feelings of clarity and curiosity. This improves research speed as well as skill gain speed.
LanguageData.VPE_Smartbuzz.label: smartbuzz
LanguageData.VPE_Vortex.description: An electirical vortex is causing difficulty moving.
LanguageData.VPE_Vortex.label: vortex
LanguageData.VPE_NoPain.description: This creature has a reduced pain sensitivity, and it takes longer to be downed due to pain.
LanguageData.VPE_NoPain.label: no pain sensitivity
LanguageData.VPE_BlockBleeding.description: Psychically-induced stasis that stops any bleeding.
LanguageData.VPE_BlockBleeding.label: psychic stabilization
LanguageData.VPE_GuardianSkipBarrier.description: Psychically crafted defensive barrier that generates large amounts of psychic heat in order to sustain itself.
LanguageData.VPE_GuardianSkipBarrier.label: guardian skipbarrier
LanguageData.VPE_Healing.label: psychic healing
LanguageData.VPE_Immunity.label: psychic immunity
LanguageData.VPE_Overshield.description: Psychically-induced personal skipbarrier. Impenetrable by ranged projectiles.
LanguageData.VPE_Overshield.label: psychic overshield
LanguageData.VPE_Regenerating.label: regenerating
LanguageData.VPE_RegrowLimbs.description: Psychically-induced tissue regeneration, which can close open wounds and regenerate missing body parts.
LanguageData.VPE_RegrowLimbs.label: psychic regeneration
LanguageData.VPE_PsycastAbilityImplant.label: psylink
LanguageData.VPE_FireShield.description: A shield of fire, sets melee attackers on fire
LanguageData.VPE_FireShield.label: fire shield
LanguageData.VPE_StaticAura.description: An aura of static electricity, causes EMP damage to everything around
LanguageData.VPE_StaticAura.label: static aura
LanguageData.VPE_AdrenalineRush.description: Psychically induced adrenaline rush, increasing sight, hearing and movement capabilities.
LanguageData.VPE_AdrenalineRush.label: psychic rush
LanguageData.VPE_BladeFocus.description: Psychically induced combat focus, greatly enhancing melee combat capabilities.
LanguageData.VPE_BladeFocus.label: blade focus
LanguageData.VPE_ControlledFrenzy.description: Temporary, psychically induced frenzy. The energy restores itself with each consecutive kill.
LanguageData.VPE_ControlledFrenzy.label: psychic frenzy
LanguageData.VPE_FiringFocus.description: Psychically induced combat focus, greatly enhancing ranged combat capabilities.
LanguageData.VPE_FiringFocus.label: firing focus
LanguageData.VPE_GuidedShot.label: guided shot
LanguageData.VPE_SpeedBoost.description: Psychically induced agility boost, greatly increasing movement speed.
LanguageData.VPE_SpeedBoost.label: psychic agility
LanguageData.VAERoy_AngoraRabbitBonded.description: This angora rabbit has bonded with a colonist. It will provide a psychic connection to that colonist increasing psychic entropy recovery rate, but the rabbit will die if the bonded colonist dies.
LanguageData.VAERoy_AngoraRabbitBonded.label: angora rabbit bonded
LanguageData.VAERoy_AngoraRabbitBondedPawn.descriptio: Psychic connection with an angora rabbit that helps with neural heat dissipation.
LanguageData.VAERoy_AngoraRabbitBondedPawn.label: angora bond
LanguageData.VAERoy_PsychicInvisibility.description: Psychically-induced invisibility. This actually affects others nearby, making their brains unable to perceive the sight of this individual, even if the eyes are unaffected.
LanguageData.VAERoy_PsychicInvisibility.label: psychic invisibility
LanguageData.VAERoy_PsychicSensitivity.description: The royal peacock nuzzled me. I can feel a psychic energy flowing through my body.
LanguageData.VAERoy_PsychicSensitivity.label: nuzzled by a peacock
LanguageData.VFEE_IngestedAperitif.description: Infection and poison protection in the stomach, as well as an ability to consume additional meals for a higher mood buff.
LanguageData.VFEE_IngestedAperitif.label: ingested aperitif
LanguageData.VFEE_AcidifierFletcher.description: Acidifier mixture injected into veins through a fletcher dart. Causes extreme pain and nearly instant death through internal acid burns.
LanguageData.VFEE_AcidifierFletcher.label: acidifier
LanguageData.VFEE_AcidifierToxblade.description: Acidifier mixture injected into veins through a fletcher dart. Causes extreme pain and nearly instant death through internal acid burns.
LanguageData.VFEE_AcidifierToxblade.label: acidifier
LanguageData.VAEWaste_LongToxflu.description: A long-term scar tissue damage to the airways in the lungs. It doesn’t require tending.
LanguageData.VAEWaste_LongToxflu.label: long toxflu
LanguageData.VAEWaste_PestigatorUnderwater.descriptio: This Pestigator is partially submerged, making it swifter and more defended.
LanguageData.VAEWaste_PestigatorUnderwater.label: underwater
LanguageData.VAEWaste_Toxflu.description: Toxflu is a highly contagious and rapidly striking disease, characterized by fever, cough, fatigue, and difficulty breathing. It spreads quickly through contact with infected bodily fluids. Those who contract Toxflu can experience severe respiratory distress and, in severe cases, death. It goes away nearly as quickly as it appears, however anyone who interacted socially with a person suffering from toxflu has a chance of catching it.
LanguageData.VAEWaste_Toxflu.label: toxflu
LanguageData.VAEWaste_Toxflu.stages.0.label: recovering
LanguageData.VAEWaste_Toxflu.stages.1.label: major
LanguageData.VAEWaste_Toxflu.stages.2.label: initial
LanguageData.VRE_ConsumedAnimalHemogen.description: Animal hemogen increases regeneration and combat capabilities of the user, but greatly decreases the capability to communicate with others.
LanguageData.VRE_ConsumedAnimalHemogen.label: consumed animal hemogen
LanguageData.VRE_ConsumedCorpseHemogen.description: Corpse hemogen greatly weakens the carrier of this hemogen type, but increases consciousness and blood filtration significantly.
LanguageData.VRE_ConsumedCorpseHemogen.label: consumed corpse hemogen
LanguageData.VRE_ConsumedSanguophageHemogen.descripti: Sanguophage hemogen gives the carrier a powerful boost to all capacities.
LanguageData.VRE_ConsumedSanguophageHemogen.label: consumed sanguophage hemogen
LanguageData.VRE_DraincasketSickness.description: After-effects of using a draincasket. Symptoms of draincasket sickness typically include localized pain, swelling, and redness at the site of the draincasket tubes' connection. Victims may experience increasing fatigue, weakness, and a general feeling of malaise.
LanguageData.VRE_DraincasketSickness.descriptionShort: After-effects of using a draincasket. Victims may experience increasing fatigue, weakness, and a general feeling of malaise.
LanguageData.VRE_DraincasketSickness.label: draincasket sickness
LanguageData.VRE_Sensitivity_Dangerous_Hediff.descrip: This is a hidden hediff that modifies the pawn's Sight depending on sunlight.
LanguageData.VRE_Sensitivity_Dangerous_Hediff.label: dangerous UV sensitivity
LanguageData.VRE_SharpTalons.comps.0.tools.0.label: talons
LanguageData.VRE_SharpTalons.description: Sharp talons which can be used in melee combat.
LanguageData.VRE_SharpTalons.label: sharp talons
LanguageData.VRE_HemogenAmplifiedWeak.description: All hemogen gains are multiplied up because this person used a small hemogen amplifier while deathresting. This effect lasts until the next deathrest.
LanguageData.VRE_HemogenAmplifiedWeak.label: hemogen amplified, weak
LanguageData.VRE_SolidifiedHemogen.description: Armor is enhanced because this person used a hemogen solidifier while deathresting. This effect lasts until the next deathrest.
LanguageData.VRE_SolidifiedHemogen.label: solidified hemogen
LanguageData.VPEH_Bloodfocus.description: Rapidly regenerating psyfocus at the cost of hemogen.
LanguageData.VPEH_Bloodfocus.label: bloodfocus
LanguageData.VPEH_Bloodmist.description: A special sanguophage particle is blocking the airways and causes intense vomiting.
LanguageData.VPEH_Bloodmist.label: bloodmist
LanguageData.VPEH_BloodRite.description: Psychic sensitivity is amplified by the current hemogen level.
LanguageData.VPEH_BloodRite.label: blood rite
LanguageData.VPE_AteBlisscap.description: This person has consumed blisscap, which makes people incredibly high, but also incredibly drowsy.
LanguageData.VPE_AteBlisscap.label: high on blisscap
LanguageData.VFED_Invisibility.description: An invisibility granted by the invisibility engulfer item. This actually affects others nearby, making their brains unable to perceive the sight of this individual, even if the eyes are unaffected.
LanguageData.VFED_Invisibility.label: invisibility
LanguageData.VPEP_BrainLeech.description: A brain parasite that leeches consciousness of the victim and gives a fraction of that consciousness to the psycaster that cast it.
LanguageData.VPEP_BrainLeech.label: brain leech
LanguageData.VPEP_Leeching.description: A psychic consciousness boost provided by the brain leech on another person.
LanguageData.VPEP_Leeching.label: leeching
LanguageData.VPEP_Puppet.description: This individual is a puppet. They inherit their backstories and traits from their puppetmaster, however they have no needs other than food and rest. They have lowered consiousness and have their experience gain greatly reduced. They will enter the same mental state as their puppeteer.
LanguageData.VPEP_Puppet.label: puppet
LanguageData.VPEP_Puppeteer.description: This individual is a puppeteer and uses psychic influence to control puppets. Puppets share their experience gain with the puppeteer. If the puppeteer dies, a psychic shockwave will knock all puppets into paralytic abasia.
LanguageData.VPEP_Puppeteer.label: puppeteer
LanguageData.VPEP_Subjugation.description: A psychic indoctrination that reduces consciousness, manipulation and breathing of the subject until they reach a breaking point and join your colony.
LanguageData.VPEP_Subjugation.label: subjugation
LanguageData.VPEP_Subjugation.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.VPEP_Subjugation.stages.1.label: major
LanguageData.VPEP_Subjugation.stages.2.label: extreme
LanguageData.BathedInSmallHotSpring.description: A recent soak in a hot spring accelerates the healing of wounds and recovery from illnesses for slightly over 24 hours after leaving the soothing waters.\n\n(The healing effects of this hediff are the same as the 'Healing waters' hediff. You do not need to constantly direct sick and/or injured pawns to repeatedly use the spring; a single visit per day is sufficient.)
LanguageData.BathedInSmallHotSpring.label: residual rejuvenation
LanguageData.IntheSmallHotSpring.description: The therapeutic waters of a hot spring allow the body to heal wounds faster and recover from illnesses more quickly. Pawns do not mind temperatures of either extreme while submerged in the hot spring's waters.
LanguageData.IntheSmallHotSpring.label: healing waters
LanguageData.AM_IntegratedTorsoArmor.description: An ancient, specialized implant involved introducing carefully selected parasites into the body, endowing the subject with a body akin to bulletproof fibers and enhancing muscular strength. However, the technology behind it has been entirely lost and cannot be replicated.
LanguageData.AM_IntegratedTorsoArmor.label: integrated parasite armor
LanguageData.AM_RampageParasite.description: An unsuccessful outcome of ancient parasitic experiments, though it greatly enhances combat effectiveness, the victim lacks any semblance of intelligence and is utterly uncontrollable.
LanguageData.AM_RampageParasite.label: rampage parasite
LanguageData.AM_Analgesic.description: Stimulate the brain with strong essential balm to secrete endorphins for pain relief and improve focus.
LanguageData.AM_Analgesic.label: essential balm
LanguageData.AM_Analgesic.stages.0.label: essential balm
LanguageData.AM_Analgesic.stages.1.label: essential balm
LanguageData.AM_AntibioticS.description: Broad spectrum antibiotics, used to combat various bacterial diseases.
LanguageData.AM_AntibioticS.label: antibiotic
LanguageData.AM_AntibioticS.stages.0.label: antibiotic
LanguageData.AM_AntibioticS.stages.1.label: antibiotic
LanguageData.AM_AntipyreticAnalgesic.description: To exert anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antipyretic effects by inhibiting the activity of cyclooxygenase (COX).
LanguageData.AM_AntipyreticAnalgesic.label: antipyretic and analgesic
LanguageData.AM_AntipyreticAnalgesic.stages.0.label: ibuprofen
LanguageData.AM_AntipyreticAnalgesic.stages.1.label: ibuprofen
LanguageData.AM_CellRegeneration.description: Regenerated substances are rapidly repairing the body,but has strong side effects.
LanguageData.AM_CellRegeneration.label: cell regeneration
LanguageData.AM_CellRegeneration.stages.0.label: exhaustion syndrome
LanguageData.AM_CellRegeneration.stages.1.label: regeneration
LanguageData.AM_Metalblood.description: The metal blood stimulant used in combat does not cause discoloration of the skin at a special concentration dose, which improves the ability of muscle tissue to withstand impact damage and to some extent increases movement speed. However, it is also more susceptible to fire damage and metabolism becomes higher.
LanguageData.AM_Metalblood.label: metalblood stimulant
LanguageData.AM_RegenerativeHormone.description: Stimulate the regeneration process by increasing the biosynthesis of purine and pyrimidine bases, RNA, and functional enzymes to promote cellular elements.But there will be side effects within a few days after injection.
LanguageData.AM_RegenerativeHormone.label: analgesic regeneration
LanguageData.AM_RegenerativeHormone.stages.0.label: exhaustion syndrome
LanguageData.AM_RegenerativeHormone.stages.1.label: regeneration
LanguageData.VQE_StudiedAncientGenetron.description: This particular colonist has studied the ancient ARC. It allows them to build, upgrade and maintain an ARC in the colony.
LanguageData.VQE_StudiedAncientGenetron.label: studied ancient ARC
LanguageData.VQE_StudiedAncientGeothermalGenetron.des: This particular colonist has studied the ancient geothermal ARC. It allows them to build, upgrade and maintain a geothermal ARC in the colony.
LanguageData.VQE_StudiedAncientNuclearGenetron.descri: This particular colonist has studied a nuclear ARC husk. It allows them to build, upgrade and maintain a nuclear ARC in the colony.
LanguageData.VQE_StudiedAncientNuclearGenetron.label: studied nuclear ARC husk
LanguageData.VQE_TraitorousInventor.description: Traitorous inventor. This hediff shouldn't be visible to players. If you are seeing this you will go to cheater hell, which is full of politicians.
LanguageData.VQE_TraitorousInventor.label: traitorous inventor
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadAlcoholHigh.description: Mead in the bloodstream. It makes people happy, but reduces capacities. Slightly reduces psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadAlcoholHigh.label: mead high
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadAlcoholHigh.stages.0.label: warm
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadAlcoholHigh.stages.1.label: tipsy
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadAlcoholHigh.stages.2.label: drunk
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadAlcoholHigh.stages.3.label: hammered
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadAlcoholHigh.stages.4.label: blackout
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineAlcoholHigh.description: Wine in the bloodstream. It makes people happy and more psychically sensitive, but reduces capacities.
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineAlcoholHigh.label: wine
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineAlcoholHigh.stages.0.label: warm
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineAlcoholHigh.stages.1.label: tipsy
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineAlcoholHigh.stages.2.label: drunk
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineAlcoholHigh.stages.3.label: hammered
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineAlcoholHigh.stages.4.label: blackout
LanguageData.VFEM2_AmnesiaDraught.description: A draught is causing the user to quickly lose memory, resulting in both negative and positive memories lasting significantly shorter.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AmnesiaDraught.label: amnesia draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_AmnesiaDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_AmnesiaDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_AntitoxDraught.description: A draught is improving the toxic resistance of the user.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AntitoxDraught.label: antitox draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_AntitoxDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_AntitoxDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_ComaDraught.description: A draught is putting the user in a chemically induced coma that slows down their metabolism greatly.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ComaDraught.label: coma draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_ComaDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_ComaDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_EfficiencyDraught.description: A draught is improving global workspeed of the user while also simultaneously slowing down their energy loss at the cost of increased chance of a heart attack. At the end of the potent duration, the user receives a major sleep fall rate increase.
LanguageData.VFEM2_EfficiencyDraught.label: efficiency draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_EfficiencyDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_EfficiencyDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_FertilityDraught.description: A draught is artificially increasing the fertility of the user. The slight boost to fertility will allow even infertile people to have a chance to become parents.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FertilityDraught.label: fertility draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_FertilityDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_FertilityDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_FocusDraught.description: A draught is increasing the capability of the user to learn, allowing them to gain more knowledge, eat faster, rest quicker and gain more psyfocus while potent. The effects are reversed when the draught is fading.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FocusDraught.label: focus draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_FocusDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_FocusDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_HealingDraught.description: A draught is improving this person’s natural wound regeneration, making them able to heal from wounds significantly faster than normal.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HealingDraught.label: healing draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_HealingDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_HealingDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_ImmunizationDraught.description: A draught is improving this person’s immune system, making them more capable of fighting off diseases and infections at the cost of making them more sleepy.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ImmunizationDraught.label: immunization draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_ImmunizationDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_ImmunizationDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_InspirationDraught.description: A draught is providing the user with mental clarity, allowing them to focus on gaining new knowledge in skills they are passionate about at the cost of diminished combat capabilities.
LanguageData.VFEM2_InspirationDraught.label: inspiration draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_InspirationDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_InspirationDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_PainkillerDraught.description: A draught is stopping the user from feeling pain at the cost of lowering their focus and productivity greatly.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PainkillerDraught.label: painkiller draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_PainkillerDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_PainkillerDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraught.description: A draught is shutting down the user, reducing their consciousness into a state of chemically inducing coma that causes organ decay and will inevitably lead to death.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraught.label: poison draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraught.stages.0.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraught.stages.1.label: final
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraughtDumbHediff.descriptio: A draught is shutting down the user, reducing their consciousness into a state of chemically inducing coma that causes organ decay and will inevitably lead to death.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraughtDumbHediff.label: poison draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneskinDraught.description: A draught is transforming the user's skin into a built-in suit of armor. The whole epidermis thickens and hardens to resist burns, while jointed exterior keratin plates form everywhere they can - including the head and face. While it's very difficult to physically hurt someone under the effects of this draught, the plates and hard skin significantly reduces the user's physical attractiveness.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneskinDraught.label: stoneskin draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneskinDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneskinDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_StrengthDraught.description: A draught is improving strength and reflexes of the user, improving their combat capabilities at the cost of increased social fight chance and higher mental break threshold.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StrengthDraught.label: strength draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_StrengthDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_StrengthDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.description: A draught is causing severe pain to the user, making them unable to even move. If they are a prisoner, they will rapidly lose their resistance, and if they are a slave, they will be fully suppressed.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.label: torturer draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_HemogenDraught.description: A draught is improving all traits and abilities of the hemogenic user, as well as replenishes the hemogen over time.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HemogenDraught.label: hemogen draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_HemogenDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_HemogenDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_HemogenDraughtDumbHediff.descripti: A draught is improving all traits and abilities of the hemogenic user, as well as replenishes the hemogen over time.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HemogenDraughtDumbHediff.label: hemogen draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_RoyalJellyDraught.description: A draught is greatly improving the immunity gain speed of the user while also boosting their consciousness and movement speed.
LanguageData.VFEM2_RoyalJellyDraught.label: royal jelly draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_RoyalJellyDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_RoyalJellyDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClarityDraught.description: A draught is improving psychic sensitivity of the user, improving their meditation capabilities.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClarityDraught.label: clarity draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClarityDraught.stages.0.label: fading
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClarityDraught.stages.1.label: potent
LanguageData.VFEM_RallyAuraBuffHediff.description: Rallying aura that prevents mental breaks.
LanguageData.VFEM_RallyAuraBuffHediff.label: rally aura
LanguageData.VFEM_RallyWearerHediff.description: Aura that rallies everyone nearby, stopping their mental breaks and preventing them from breaking again.
LanguageData.VFEM_RallyWearerHediff.label: rally
LanguageData.VFEM2_Sting.label: sting
LanguageData.VFEM2_PlagueMask.description: Plague mask prevents the wearer from catching plague.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PlagueMask.label: plague mask
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.description: A deep psychological burden stemming from overwhelming remorse and sorrow caused by being the last remaining member of one's faction. This condition gradually consumes the mind with grief and despair, leading to worsening depression over time.
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.label: guilt
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.0.label: lingering guilt
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.1.label: growing remorse
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.2.label: deep regret
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.3.label: crushing guilt
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.4.label: tormenting sorrow
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.5.label: despairing isolation
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.6.label: guilt (acceptance)
LanguageData.VQE_BleedrateCrypto_10.stages.0.label: armour
LanguageData.VQE_BleedrateCrypto_20.stages.0.label: armour
LanguageData.VQE_BleedrateCrypto_5.stages.0.label: armour
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoSlowdown.description: A chilling affliction caused by exposure to cryptofreeze energy. It weakens the target’s heat armor while simultaneously increasing their minimum comfortable temperature, making them more vulnerable to both extreme cold and heat while significantly reducing movement speed. If crypto slowdown reaches the maximum effect, the target becomes completely engulfed in cryptofreeze, causing severe damage.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoSlowdown.label: crypto slowdown
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoSlowdown.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoSlowdown.stages.1.label: moderate
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoSlowdown.stages.2.label: major
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoSlowdown.stages.3.label: severe
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoSlowdown.stages.4.label: extreme
LanguageData.VQE_IceCrawlerHediff.description: The Ice crawler becomes more dangerous if it’s exposed to extremely cold temperatures.
LanguageData.VQE_IceCrawlerHediff.label: exposed to extreme cold
LanguageData.VQE_MegamidgeHediff.description: The Megamidge becomes more dangerous if it’s exposed to extremely cold temperatures.
LanguageData.VQE_MegamidgeHediff.label: exposed to extreme cold
LanguageData.VQED_General.label: general
LanguageData.VGE_EngineeringCommand.description: Gravship maintenance and construction speeds are boosted thanks to this person using the engineering command ability.
LanguageData.VGE_EngineeringCommand.label: engineering command
LanguageData.VGE_EngineeringCommandBuff.description: This person's gravship maintenance and construction speeds are boosted thanks to being near someone who is using the engineering command ability.
LanguageData.VGE_EngineeringCommandBuff.label: engineering command
LanguageData.VQEA_Bulwark.description: Archites within the carrier’s tissues reinforce cellular structures, reducing incoming damage by half. Pain receptors are dampened in favor of combat awareness, and the body itself resists trauma that would cripple an ordinary human.
LanguageData.VQEA_Bulwark.label: bulwark
LanguageData.VQEA_Enormous.description: Carriers of this gene are saturated with growth-regulating archites that massively increase body size and muscle mass. Their immense frame allows for feats of brute strength, at the cost of speed and appetite.
LanguageData.VQEA_Enormous.label: enormous
LanguageData.VQEA_HemocollapseSyndrome.description: A rare and terminal disorder where the bone marrow gradually fails to produce vital hemogen components. The body weakens and the organs strain, eventually leading to death.
LanguageData.VQEA_HemocollapseSyndrome.label: hemocollapse syndrome
LanguageData.VQEA_HemocollapseSyndrome.stages.0.label: latent
LanguageData.VQEA_HemocollapseSyndrome.stages.1.label: progressive
LanguageData.VQEA_HemocollapseSyndrome.stages.2.label: advanced
LanguageData.VQEA_HemocollapseSyndrome.stages.3.label: terminal
LanguageData.VQEA_InjectionComa.description: This person has undergone an archite injection. The injected archites are actively rewriting their genetic composition, altering tissues and cellular chemistry throughout the body. During this process, the body cannot safely function, so the subject is held in a deep coma.\n\nThe duration of this coma can be shortened with advanced lab equipment.
LanguageData.VQEA_InjectionComa.label: injection coma
LanguageData.VQEA_Invisibility.description: This person has used psychic suggestion to turn themselves invisible for a short duration.
LanguageData.VQEA_Invisibility.label: invisibility
LanguageData.VQEA_Levitation.description: Limited flight that allows this colonist to levitate over terrain. They will ignore terrain movement costs when moving.
LanguageData.VQEA_Levitation.label: levitation
LanguageData.VQEA_MasterfulIntellectual.description: This person will conduct research subconsciously, constantly generating scientific progress even while performing other tasks or resting.
LanguageData.VQEA_MasterfulIntellectual.label: masterful intellectual
LanguageData.VQEA_MatterPhasing.description: This person has shifted into an intangible state, letting them pass through walls before becoming solid again.
LanguageData.VQEA_MatterPhasing.label: matter phasing
LanguageData.VQEA_NoPain.description: This creature has a reduced pain sensitivity, and it takes longer to be downed due to pain.
LanguageData.VQEA_NoPain.label: no pain sensitivity
LanguageData.VQEA_PassiveMeditation.description: Carriers of this gene possess archites that passively channel ambient psychic energy, replenishing psyfocus without meditation. These ever-attuned minds remain sharp, composed, and ready to cast at all times.
LanguageData.VQEA_PassiveMeditation.label: passive meditation
LanguageData.VQEA_PlasteelClaws.comps.0.tools.0.label: plasteel claw
LanguageData.VQEA_PlasteelClaws.description: Carriers of this gene grow synthetic alloy claws capable of slicing through armor and flesh. These natural weapons are always equipped and strike with brutal efficiency.
LanguageData.VQEA_PlasteelClaws.label: plasteel claw
LanguageData.VQEA_PlasteelSkin.description: Carriers of this gene possess dense, reinforced dermal armor. Their skin resists bullets, absorbs blunt force, and disperses heat, turning their entire body into a living shield.
LanguageData.VQEA_PlasteelSkin.label: plasteel skin
LanguageData.VQEA_Regenerating.label: regenerating
LanguageData.VQEA_SelfRepairingTissue.description: This person possesses archite-woven regenerative tissue that continuously rebuilds damaged cells and restores lost structure. They are capable of regrowing missing organs and body parts, but the process takes time.
LanguageData.VQEA_SelfRepairingTissue.label: self-repairing tissue
LanguageData.VQEA_SuicideHediff.label: dying
LanguageData.VQEA_Woundless.description: Carriers of this gene rapidly heal from bleeding wounds. Their flesh seals itself moments after injury, preventing blood loss entirely and allowing them to fight through trauma that would kill others.
LanguageData.VQEA_Woundless.label: woundless
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaPearlsHediff.description: Eating some anima pearls has provided a small psychic sensitivity boost.
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaPearlsHediff.label: psychic sensitivity boost
LanguageData.VEE_ColossalFauna.description: This animal is larger than usual.
LanguageData.VEE_ColossalFauna.label: colossal animal
LanguageData.VEE_DustStorm.description: A dust storm is making vision practically impossible in this region.
LanguageData.VEE_DustStorm.label: affected by dust storm
LanguageData.VEE_Microfauna.description: This animal is smaller than usual.
LanguageData.VEE_Microfauna.label: microfauna
LanguageData.VEE_QuicksandHediff.description: Moving through quicksand. Greatly reduces movement speed.
LanguageData.VEE_QuicksandHediff.label: traversing quicksand
LanguageData.VEE_RottenStench.description: Acrid vapors seep from the ground, blanketing the area in a foul smell that burns the lungs and sours the mood.
LanguageData.VEE_RottenStench.label: rotten stench
LanguageData.BadHygiene.label: bad hygiene
LanguageData.BadHygiene.stages.0.label: moderate
LanguageData.BadHygiene.stages.1.label: severe
LanguageData.BadHygiene.stages.2.label: extreme
LanguageData.Cholera.label: cholera
LanguageData.Cholera.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.Cholera.stages.1.label: major
LanguageData.Cholera.stages.2.label: extreme
LanguageData.Cholera.stages.3.label: extreme
LanguageData.DBHDehydration.label: dehydration
LanguageData.DBHDehydration.stages.0.label: trivial
LanguageData.DBHDehydration.stages.1.label: minor
LanguageData.DBHDehydration.stages.2.label: moderate
LanguageData.DBHDehydration.stages.3.label: severe
LanguageData.DBHDehydration.stages.4.label: extreme
LanguageData.Diarrhea.label: diarrhea
LanguageData.Diarrhea.stages.0.label: recovering
LanguageData.Diarrhea.stages.1.label: major
LanguageData.Diarrhea.stages.2.label: initial
LanguageData.Dysentery.label: dysentery
LanguageData.Dysentery.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.Dysentery.stages.1.label: major
LanguageData.Dysentery.stages.2.label: extreme
LanguageData.Washing.label: washing
LanguageData.BionicBladder.label: bionic bladder
LanguageData.HygieneEnhancer.label: hygiene enhancer
